use_cases: Display time remaining until product launches or events with smooth animated number transitions
Show limited-time offer countdowns for e-commerce flash sales
Indicate trial period or subscription expiration for SaaS applications
Count down to webinar, course deadline, or live stream start times
Create urgency for promotional campaigns with real-time updating countdown
ai_summary: Animated countdown timer component that displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds with fluid number transitions using @number-flow/react and framer-motion. Updates every second and calculates time remaining between configurable start and end dates. Features clean minimalist typography with zero-padded number formatting for consistent visual alignment.
